channel.title: Lockout Tagout on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Lockout Tagout on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001): OT Systems and Safety Foundations
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+ Course" , "OT Systems" , "Safety Foundations" , "Industrial Control Systems" , "SCADA" , "PLC" , "Industrial Protocols" , "Operational Technology" , "SOT-001" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master OT systems and safety foundations for the CompTIA SecOT+ SOT-001 exam. Learn safety procedures, OT components like PLCs and HMIs, control systems such as SCADA and DCS, control logic, and industrial protocols including Modbus and DNP3.
